create.gaj6_ps_feeding_tables: CREATE TABLE `gaj6_ps_feeding_tables` ( `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `checksum` char(32) NOT NULL, `source_hash` char(32) NOT NULL, `brand` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL, `line` varchar(150) DEFAULT NULL, `scope` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'product', `species` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `weight_basis` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `row_dimension` varchar(30) DEFAULT NULL, `shape` varchar(20) NOT NULL, `status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', `reason` varchar(60) DEFAULT NULL, `source_url` text DEFAULT NULL, `source_version` varchar(60) DEFAULT NULL, `row_count` smallint(5) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `parsed_at` datetime NOT NULL, `verified_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `verified_by` varchar(60) DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` datetime NOT NULL, `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL, `rows_backup_json` longtext DEFAULT NULL, `lookup_method` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `weight_basis_source` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `verification_note` text DEFAULT NULL, `source_structure` varchar(20) DEFAULT NULL, `resolution_policy` varchar(24) DEFAULT NULL, `axis_resolution_policy` text DEFAULT NULL, `b_path_status` varchar(10) DEFAULT NULL, `value_row_count` smallint(5) unsigned DEFAULT NULL, `redirect_row_count` smallint(5) unsigned DEFAULT NULL, `version_no` smallint(5) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `supersedes_table_id` bigint(20) unsigned DEFAULT NULL, `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, `activated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `retired_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL, `import_batch_id` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `table_key` varchar(60) DEFAULT NULL, `canonical_table_hash` char(64) DEFAULT NULL, `classifier_version` varchar(30) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `uq_checksum` (`checksum`), KEY `idx_status` (`status`), KEY `idx_brand` (`brand`), KEY `idx_shape` (`shape`), KEY `idx_active` (`is_active`,`status`), KEY `idx_tk` (`table_key`,`is_active`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM AUTO_INCREMENT=224 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci
create.gaj6_ps_feeding_rows: CREATE TABLE `gaj6_ps_feeding_rows` ( `id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `feeding_table_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL, `row_order` smallint(5) unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `weight_from_kg` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL, `weight_to_kg` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT NULL, `amount_from_g` decimal(7,2) DEFAULT NULL, `amount_to_g` decimal(7,2) DEFAULT NULL, `condition_dimensions` text DEFAULT NULL, `condition_raw` text DEFAULT NULL, `cell_type` varchar(16) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'value', `redirect_reason` varchar(40) DEFAULT NULL, `source_label` varchar(60) DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_ft` (`feeding_table_id`), KEY `idx_weight` (`weight_from_kg`,`weight_to_kg`), CONSTRAINT `chk_value_has_amount` CHECK (`cell_type` <> 'value' or `amount_from_g` is not null) ) ENGINE=MyISAM AUTO_INCREMENT=13828 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci
create.gaj6_ps_feeding_map: CREATE TABLE `gaj6_ps_feeding_map` ( `feeding_table_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL, `product_id` bigint(20) unsigned NOT NULL, `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, PRIMARY KEY (`feeding_table_id`,`product_id`), KEY `idx_product` (`product_id`) ) ENGINE=MyISAM DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_520_ci
